creative_brief: Close-up of Rachel Ward on her farm, weathered hands holding fresh produce, with rolling green pastures in the background.
primary_text:
Three months ago, Rachel Ward told me she was losing $2 on every kilo of beef she sold. 

The wholesalers took their cut. 

The supermarkets took theirs. Rachel got what was left. 

Now her beef goes direct to Sydney families via FarmThru. No middlemen. No markup games. Just Rachel's Farm to your nearest hub. 

We can't promise returns, but we can promise transparency.
headline: She was losing money on every kilo
description: Real food from real farms. Be part of what we're building.
